question_text.en: A company has an application that provides marketing services to stores. The services are based on previous purchases by store customers. The stores upload transaction data to the company through SFTP, and the data is processed and analyzed to generate new marketing offers. Some of the files can exceed 200 GB in size. Recently, the company discovered that some of the stores have uploaded files that contain personally identifiable information (PII) that should not have been included. The company wants administrators to be alerted if PII is shared again. The company also wants to automate remediation. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?
question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個為商店提供行銷服務的應用程式。這些服務是基於商店顧客之前的購買情況。商店透過SFTP將交易資料上傳到公司，資料經過處理和分析以產生新的行銷報價。某些檔案的大小可能超過 200 GB。最近，該公司發現一些商店上傳的檔案包含不應包含的個人識別資訊（PII）。該公司希望如果 PII 再次被分享，管理員會收到警報。該公司還希望實現自動化修復。解決方案架構師應該如何做才能以最少的開發工作來滿足這些要求？

A.en: Use an Amazon S3 bucket as a secure transfer point. Use Amazon Inspector to scan the objects in the bucket. If objects contain PII, trigger an S3 Lifecycle policy to remove the objects that contain PII.
A.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 儲存桶作為安全傳輸點。使用 Amazon Inspector 掃描儲存桶中的物件。如果物件包含 PII，則觸發 S3 生命週期策略以刪除包含 PII 的物件。

B.en: Use an Amazon S3 bucket as a secure transfer point. Use Amazon Macie to scan the objects in the bucket. If objects contain PII, use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to trigger a notification to the administrators to remove the objects that contain PII.
B.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 儲存桶作為安全傳輸點。使用 Amazon Macie 掃描儲存桶中的物件。如果物件包含 PII，請使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 觸發向管理員傳送的通知，以刪除包含 PII 的物件。

C.en: Implement custom scanning algorithms in an AWS Lambda function. Trigger the function when objects are loaded into the bucket. If objects contain PII, use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to trigger a notification to the administrators to remove the objects that contain PII.
C.zh: 在 AWS Lambda 函式中實作自訂掃描演演算法。當物件載入到桶中時觸發該函式。如果物件包含 PII，請使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 觸發向管理員傳送的通知，以刪除包含 PII 的物件。

D.en: Implement custom scanning algorithms in an AWS Lambda function. Trigger the function when objects are loaded into the bucket. If objects contain PII, use Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) to trigger a notification to the administrators and trigger an S3 Lifecycle policy to remove the objects that contain PII.
D.zh: 在 AWS Lambda 函式中實作自訂掃描演演算法。當物件載入到桶中時觸發該函式。如果物件包含 PII，請使用 Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) 觸發向管理員傳送的通知，並觸發 S3 生命週期策略來刪除包含 PII 的物件。

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Inspector 對支援的運算工作負載執行漏洞管理，並且不會發現 S3 物件內的 PII。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Inspector performs vulnerability management for supported compute workloads and does not discover PII inside S3 objects.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon Macie 為 Amazon S3 提供託管敏感資料發現，並且當 PII 發現需要透過最少的自訂開發進行修復時，SNS 通知可以向管理員發出警報。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Macie provides managed sensitive-data discovery for Amazon S3, and an SNS notification can alert administrators when PII findings require remediation with minimal custom development.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：自訂 Lambda 掃描器需要設計、測試和維護 PII 偵測邏輯，這比 Amazon Macie 需要更多的開發工作。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A custom Lambda scanner requires designing, testing, and maintaining PII detection logic, which creates more development effort than Amazon Macie.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：自訂掃描邏輯加上 SES 配置增加了開發和通知管理工作，而 S3 生命週期策略不是立即發現驅動的刪除機制。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Custom scanning logic plus SES configuration adds development and notification-management work, and an S3 Lifecycle policy is not an immediate finding-driven deletion mechanism.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 Amazon S3 儲存桶作為安全傳輸點。使用 Amazon Macie 掃描儲存桶中的物件。如果物件包含 PII，請使用 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 觸發向管理員傳送的通知，以刪除包含 PII 的物件。
answer_text.en: B. Use an Amazon S3 bucket as a secure transfer point. Use Amazon Macie to scan the objects in the bucket. If objects contain PII, use Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) to trigger a notification to the administrators to remove the objects that contain PII.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (64%) D (36%) 1。考點摘要：Amazon Macie 為 Amazon S3 提供託管敏感資料發現，並且當 PII 發現需要透過最少的自訂開發進行修復時，SNS 通知可以向管理員發出警報。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (64%) D (36%) 1. Key point: Amazon Macie provides managed sensitive-data discovery for Amazon S3, and an SNS notification can alert administrators when PII findings require remediation with minimal custom development.

question_text.en: A company needs guaranteed Amazon EC2 capacity in three specific Availability Zones in a specific AWS Region for an upcoming event that will last 1 week. What should the company do to guarantee the EC2 capacity?
question_text.zh: 一家公司需要在特定 AWS 區域的三個特定可用區中保證 Amazon EC2 容量，以應對即將舉行的持續 1 週的活動。公司該如何保證EC2容量？

A.en: Purchase Reserved Instances that specify the Region needed.
A.zh: 購買指定所需區域的預留例項。

B.en: Create an On-Demand Capacity Reservation that specifies the Region needed.
B.zh: 建立指定所需區域的按需容量預留。

C.en: Purchase Reserved Instances that specify the Region and three Availability Zones needed.
C.zh: 購買指定所需區域和三個可用區的預留例項。

D.en: Create an On-Demand Capacity Reservation that specifies the Region and three Availability Zones needed.
D.zh: 建立指定所需區域和三個可用區的按需容量預留。

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：預留例項提供長期成本最佳化選項，但不保證特定時間段的容量。它只適合降低長時間執行執行個體的成本。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Reserved Instances provide long-term cost optimization options, but it does not guarantee capacity for a specific time period. It is only suitable for reducing the cost of long-running instances.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：按需容量預留可以確保容量，但僅指定 Region 並不足以滿足問題要求，因為問題明確要求在三個特定可用區中保證容量。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: On-Demand Capacity Reservation can guarantee capacity, but just specifying the Region is not enough to meet the question requirements because the question clearly requires guaranteed capacity in three specific Availability Zones.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：雖然可以指定 Region 和可用區，但預留執行個體仍無法保證特定時間段內的容量。主要用於成本最佳化而非產能保障。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Region and Availability Zones can be specified, Reserved Instances still cannot guarantee capacity within a specific time period. It is mainly used for cost optimization rather than capacity guarantee.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：按需容量預留允許使用者在特定時間內為特定Region和Available Zone預留EC2容量，完全滿足問題的要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: On-Demand Capacity Reservation allows users to reserve EC2 capacity for specific Regions and Availability Zones within a specific period of time, which fully meets the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: D. 建立指定所需區域和三個可用區的按需容量預留。
answer_text.en: D. Create an On-Demand Capacity Reservation that specifies the Region and three Availability Zones needed.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。考點摘要：按需容量預留允許使用者在特定時間內為特定Region和Available Zone預留EC2容量，完全滿足問題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Key point: On-Demand Capacity Reservation allows users to reserve EC2 capacity for specific Regions and Availability Zones within a specific period of time, which fully meets the requirements of the question.

question_text.en: A company's website uses an Amazon EC2 instance store for its catalog of items. The company wants to make sure that the catalog is highly available and that the catalog is stored in a durable location. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司的網站使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體儲存來儲存其專案目錄。該公司希望確保目錄具有高可用性，並且目錄儲存在持久的位置。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？

A.en: Move the catalog to Amazon ElastiCache for Redis.
A.zh: 將目錄移至 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis。

B.en: Deploy a larger EC2 instance with a larger instance store.
B.zh: 部署具有更大執行個體儲存的更大 EC2 執行個體。

C.en: Move the catalog from the instance store to Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive.
C.zh: 將目錄從執行個體儲存移至 Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive。

D.en: Move the catalog to an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system.
D.zh: 將目錄移至 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 是一項記憶體快取服務，主要旨在加快資料存取速度，而不是儲存永續性資料。它不適合儲存產品目錄，因為快取失效或節點故障可能會導致資料遺失。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon ElastiCache for Redis is an in-memory caching service designed primarily to speed up data access, not to store persistent data. It is not suitable for storing product catalogs because the data can be lost in cache invalidation or node failure.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：EC2執行個體儲存是暫存，當執行個體停止或終止時資料會遺失。部署更大的例項儲存並不能解決資料持久化問題。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EC2 instance storage is temporary storage and data is lost when the instance is stopped or terminated. Deploying larger instance storage does not solve the data persistence problem.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive 是一種用於歸檔資料的低成本、長期儲存解決方案。它不適合儲存需要頻繁存取的產品目錄。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 Glacier Deep Archive is a low-cost, long-term storage solution for archiving data. It is not suitable for storing product catalogs that require frequent access.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon EFS 是一種可擴充檔案儲存服務，支援高可用性和資料永續性。適合儲存需要頻繁存取的產品目錄，並且可以與多個EC2例項共用。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon EFS is a scalable file storage service that supports high availability and data durability. It is suitable for storing product catalogs that require frequent access, and can be shared with multiple EC2 instances.

answer_text.zh: D. 將目錄移至 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統。
answer_text.en: D. Move the catalog to an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (93%) 7%。考點摘要：Amazon EFS 是一種可擴充檔案儲存服務，支援高可用性和資料永續性。適合儲存需要頻繁存取的產品目錄，並且可以與多個EC2例項共用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (93%) 7%. Key point: Amazon EFS is a scalable file storage service that supports high availability and data durability. It is suitable for storing product catalogs that require frequent access, and can be shared with multiple EC2 instances.

question_text.en: A company stores call transcript files on a monthly basis. Users access the files randomly within 1 year of the call, but users access the files infrequently after 1 year. The company wants to optimize its solution by giving users the ability to query and retrieve files that are less than 1-year-old as quickly as possible. A delay in retrieving older files is acceptable. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?
question_text.zh: 一家公司每月儲存通話記錄檔。使用者在呼叫後 1 年內隨機存取這些檔案，但 1 年後使用者很少存取這些檔案。該公司希望透過讓使用者能夠盡快查詢和檢索不到 1 年的檔案來最佳化其解決方案。檢索舊檔案的延遲是可以​​接受的。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？

A.en: Store individual files with tags in Amazon S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval. Query the tags to retrieve the files from S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval.
A.zh: 在 Amazon S3 Glacier 即時擷取中儲存帶有標籤的單一檔案。查詢標籤以從 S3 Glacier 即時擷取檢索檔案。

B.en: Store individual files in Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering. Use S3 Lifecycle policies to move the files to S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 1 year. Query and retrieve the files that are in Amazon S3 by using Amazon Athena. Query and retrieve the files that are in S3 Glacier by using S3 Glacier Select.
B.zh: 將單一檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 智慧分層中。 1 年後，使用 S3 生命週期策略將檔案移至 S3 Glacier 彈性檢索。使用 Amazon Athena 查詢和檢索 Amazon S3 中的檔案。使用 S3 Glacier Select 查詢並擷取 S3 Glacier 中的檔案。

C.en: Store individual files with tags in Amazon S3 Standard storage. Store search metadata for each archive in Amazon S3 Standard storage. Use S3 Lifecycle policies to move the files to S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval after 1 year. Query and retrieve the files by searching for metadata from Amazon S3.
C.zh: 將帶有標籤的單一檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 標準儲存中。將每個存檔的搜尋元資料儲存在 Amazon S3 標準儲存中。 1 年後，使用 S3 生命週期策略將檔案移至 S3 Glacier Instant Retrieval。透過從 Amazon S3 搜尋元資料來查詢和檢索檔案。

D.en: Store individual files in Amazon S3 Standard storage. Use S3 Lifecycle policies to move the files to S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 1 year. Store search metadata in Amazon RDS. Query the files from Amazon RDS. Retrieve the files from S3 Glacier Deep Archive.
D.zh: 將單一檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 標準儲存中。 1 年後，使用 S3 生命週期策略將檔案移至 S3 Glacier Deep Archive。將搜尋元資料儲存在 Amazon RDS 中。從 Amazon RDS 查詢檔案。從 S3 Glacier Deep Archive 檢索檔案。

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Glacier Instant Retrieval 提供毫秒級訪問，但比較冷的存檔類收費更高，因此將其用於所有檔案並不能最佳化不頻繁的年後訪問模式。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Glacier Instant Retrieval provides millisecond access but charges more than colder archive classes, so using it for all files does not optimize the infrequent post-year access pattern.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：S3 智慧分層適應不可預測的第一年訪問，一年後生命週期過渡到 Glacier 靈活檢索可降低存檔成本，同時允許可接受的延遲檢索。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: S3 Intelligent-Tiering adapts to unpredictable first-year access, and a Lifecycle transition to Glacier Flexible Retrieval after one year reduces archive cost while allowing acceptable delayed retrieval.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：將檔案和元資料在 S3 Standard 中保留一年，然後使用 Glacier Instant Retrieval 會保留比規定存取模式所需的更高的儲存成本。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Keeping the files and metadata in S3 Standard for a year and then using Glacier Instant Retrieval retains higher storage cost than necessary for the stated access pattern.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：S3 Glacier Deep Archive 提供成本非常低的歸檔儲存，但與託管分層方法相比，在 Amazon RDS 中維護可搜尋元資料會增加持續的資料庫成本和營運開銷。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 Glacier Deep Archive provides very low-cost archival storage, but maintaining searchable metadata in Amazon RDS adds ongoing database cost and operational overhead compared with the managed tiering approach.

answer_text.zh: B. 將單一檔案儲存在 Amazon S3 智慧分層中。 1 年後，使用 S3 生命週期策略將檔案移至 S3 Glacier 彈性檢索。使用 Amazon Athena 查詢和檢索 Amazon S3 中的檔案。使用 S3 Glacier Select 查詢並擷取 S3 Glacier 中的檔案。
answer_text.en: B. Store individual files in Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering. Use S3 Lifecycle policies to move the files to S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval after 1 year. Query and retrieve the files that are in Amazon S3 by using Amazon Athena. Query and retrieve the files that are in S3 Glacier by using S3 Glacier Select.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (70%) C (24%) 5%。考點摘要：S3 智慧分層適應不可預測的第一年訪問，一年後生命週期過渡到 Glacier 靈活檢索可降低存檔成本，同時允許可接受的延遲檢索。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (70%) C (24%) 5%. Key point: S3 Intelligent-Tiering adapts to unpredictable first-year access, and a Lifecycle transition to Glacier Flexible Retrieval after one year reduces archive cost while allowing acceptable delayed retrieval.

question_text.en: A company has a production workload that runs on 1,000 Amazon EC2 Linux instances. The workload is powered by third-party software. The company needs to patch the third-party software on all EC2 instances as quickly as possible to remediate a critical security vulnerability. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司的生產工作負載在 1,000 個 Amazon EC2 Linux 執行個體上運作。此工作負載由第三方軟體提供支援。該公司需要盡快修補所有 EC2 執行個體上的第三方軟體，以修復關鍵安全漏洞。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？

A.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to apply the patch to all EC2 instances.
A.zh: 建立 AWS Lambda 函式以將補丁套用到所有 EC2 執行個體。

B.en: Configure AWS Systems Manager Patch Manager to apply the patch to all EC2 instances.
B.zh: 配置 AWS Systems Manager 補丁管理器以將補丁套用到所有 EC2 執行個體。

C.en: Schedule an AWS Systems Manager maintenance window to apply the patch to all EC2 instances.
C.zh: 安排 AWS Systems Manager 維護時段以將補丁套用到所有 EC2 執行個體。

D.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Run Command to run a custom command that applies the patch to all EC2 instances.
D.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager Run Command 執行將補丁套用到所有 EC2 執行個體的自訂命令。

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Lambda 函式不是用於跨 1,000 個 EC2 執行個體執行緊急自訂修補程式的託管佇列管理機制。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A Lambda function is not the managed fleet-administration mechanism for executing an urgent custom patch across 1,000 EC2 instances.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：補丁管理器透過補丁基線應用受支援的作業系統和應用程式補丁，但這種緊急的自訂第三方套件需要公司提供的特定命令。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Patch Manager applies supported operating system and application patches through patch baselines, but this urgent custom third-party package requires a specific command supplied by the company.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：維護時段將工作安排在稍後批准的時間段內，這與盡快修復關鍵漏洞的要求相衝突。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A maintenance window schedules work for a later approved period, which conflicts with the requirement to remediate the critical vulnerability as quickly as possible.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：Systems Manager Run Command 可以在託管 EC2 佇列中同時執行公司的自訂第三方修補程式命令，而無需互動式登入。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Systems Manager Run Command can execute the company's custom third-party patch command concurrently across the managed EC2 fleet without interactive logins.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 AWS Systems Manager Run Command 執行將補丁套用到所有 EC2 執行個體的自訂命令。
answer_text.en: D. Use AWS Systems Manager Run Command to run a custom command that applies the patch to all EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (68%) B (32%)。考點摘要：Systems Manager Run Command 可以在託管 EC2 佇列中同時執行公司的自訂第三方修補程式命令，而無需互動式登入。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (68%) B (32%). Key point: Systems Manager Run Command can execute the company's custom third-party patch command concurrently across the managed EC2 fleet without interactive logins.

question_text.en: A company is developing an application that provides order shipping statistics for retrieval by a REST API. The company wants to extract the shipping statistics, organize the data into an easy-to-read HTML format, and send the report to several email addresses at the same time every morning. Which combination of steps should a solutions architect take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)
question_text.zh: 一家公司正在開發一個應用程式，該應用程式提供訂單運輸統計資訊以供 REST API 檢索。該公司希望提取運輸統計資料，將資料組織成易於閱讀的 HTML 格式，並每天早上同時將報告傳送到多個電子郵件地址。解決方案架構師應該採取哪些步驟組合來滿足這些要求？ （選擇兩項。）

A.en: Configure the application to send the data to Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose.
A.zh: 設定應用程式以將資料傳送至 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose。

B.en: Use Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) to format the data and to send the report by email.
B.zh: 使用 Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) 格式化資料並透過電子郵件傳送報告。

C.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) scheduled event that invokes an AWS Glue job to query the application's API for the data.
C.zh: 建立 Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) 計畫事件，該事件會呼叫 AWS Glue 作業來查詢應用程式的 API 中的資料。

D.en: Create an Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) scheduled event that invokes an AWS Lambda function to query the application's API for the data.
D.zh: 建立 Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) 計畫事件，該事件呼叫 AWS Lambda 函式來查詢應用程式的 API 中的資料。

E.en: Store the application data in Amazon S3. Create an Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) topic as an S3 event destination to send the report by email.
E.zh: 將應用程式資料儲存在 Amazon S3 中。建立 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 主題作為 S3 事件目標以透過電子郵件傳送報告。

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Kinesis Data Firehose 將串流資料傳送到目標，與已規劃的 REST API 查詢和格式化電子郵件報告無關。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Kinesis Data Firehose delivers streaming data to destinations and is unrelated to a scheduled REST API query and formatted email report.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon SES 可以將產生的 HTML 報告傳送給多個電子郵件收件者。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon SES can send the generated HTML report to multiple email recipients.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Glue 適用於託管資料整合和 ETL 作業；為簡單的日常 API 請求呼叫它會增加不必要的複雜性。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Glue is intended for managed data integration and ETL jobs; invoking it for a simple daily API request adds unnecessary complexity.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：EventBridge 計畫可以每天早上呼叫 Lambda，該函式可以呼叫 REST API 並建立 HTML 報告。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: An EventBridge schedule can invoke Lambda each morning, and the function can call the REST API and construct the HTML report.

E.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：S3 事件通知是由物件更改而不是所需的每日計劃觸發的，並且 SNS 電子郵件不提供所要求的報告格式化工作流程。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: An S3 event notification is triggered by object changes rather than the required daily schedule, and SNS email does not provide the requested report-formatting workflow.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) 格式化資料並透過電子郵件傳送報告。；D. 建立 Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) 計畫事件，該事件呼叫 AWS Lambda 函式來查詢應用程式的 API 中的資料。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES) to format the data and to send the report by email.; D. Create an Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) scheduled event that invokes an AWS Lambda function to query the application's API for the data.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BD (70%) 14% 其他。考點摘要：Amazon SES 可以將產生的 HTML 報告傳送給多個電子郵件收件者。；EventBridge 計畫可以每天早上呼叫 Lambda，該函式可以呼叫 REST API 並建立 HTML 報告。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BD (70%) 14% Other. Key point: Amazon SES can send the generated HTML report to multiple email recipients.; An EventBridge schedule can invoke Lambda each morning, and the function can call the REST API and construct the HTML report.

question_text.en: A company wants to migrate its on-premises application to AWS. The application produces output files that vary in size from tens of gigabytes to hundreds of terabytes. The application data must be stored in a standard file system structure. The company wants a solution that scales automatically, is highly available, and requires minimum operational overhead. Which solution will meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司希望將其本地應用程式遷移到 AWS。該應用程式產生的輸出檔案大小從數十 GB 到數百 TB 不等。應用程式資料必須儲存在標準檔案系統結構中。該公司希望有一個能夠自動擴充套件、高度可用並且需要最小營運開銷的解決方案。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？

A.en: Migrate the application to run as containers on Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Use Amazon S3 for storage.
A.zh: 將應用程式移轉到在 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 上作為容器執行。使用 Amazon S3 進行儲存。

B.en: Migrate the application to run as containers on Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). Use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) for storage.
B.zh: 將應用程式移轉到在 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 上作為容器執行。使用 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 進行儲存。

C.en: Migrate the application to Amazon EC2 instances in a Multi-AZ Auto Scaling group. Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) for storage.
C.zh: 將應用程式移轉到多可用區 Auto Scaling 群組中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體。使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 進行儲存。

D.en: Migrate the application to Amazon EC2 instances in a Multi-AZ Auto Scaling group. Use Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) for storage.
D.zh: 將應用程式移轉到多可用區 Auto Scaling 群組中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體。使用 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 進行儲存。

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：它是一個容器編排服務，適合執行容器化應用程式，但問題要求資料儲存在標準檔案結構中。 Amazon S3 是一種物件儲存，不支援標準檔案結構。因此該選項不符合題目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: It is a container orchestration service, suitable for running containerized applications, but the question requires that data be stored in a standard file structure. Amazon S3 is an object storage and does not support standard file structures. Therefore this option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon EBS 是一種通常附加在一個可用區內的區塊儲存，不提供應用程式所需的共用、自動擴充檔案系統。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EBS is block storage normally attached within one Availability Zone and does not provide the shared, automatically scaling file system required by the application.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：多可用區 Auto Scaling 群組提供可擴充運算，而 Amazon EFS 提供託管、高度可用的共用檔案系統，可自動成長到所需的資料量。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: A Multi-AZ Auto Scaling group provides scalable compute, while Amazon EFS supplies a managed, highly available shared file system that grows automatically to the required data volume.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：EBS雖然是高效能區塊儲存，但無法跨多個例項共享，也不支援標準檔案結構。該選項不符合題目要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although EBS is high-performance block storage, it cannot be shared across multiple instances and does not support standard file structures. This option does not meet the question requirements.

answer_text.zh: C. 將應用程式移轉到多可用區 Auto Scaling 群組中的 Amazon EC2 執行個體。使用 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 進行儲存。
answer_text.en: C. Migrate the application to Amazon EC2 instances in a Multi-AZ Auto Scaling group. Use Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) for storage.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：多可用區 Auto Scaling 群組提供可擴充運算，而 Amazon EFS 提供託管、高度可用的共用檔案系統，可自動成長到所需的資料量。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: A Multi-AZ Auto Scaling group provides scalable compute, while Amazon EFS supplies a managed, highly available shared file system that grows automatically to the required data volume.

question_text.en: A company needs to store its accounting records in Amazon S3. The records must be immediately accessible for 1 year and then must be archived for an additional 9 years. No one at the company, including administrative users and root users, can be able to delete the records during the entire 10-year period. The records must be stored with maximum resiliency. Which solution will meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司需要將其會計記錄儲存在 Amazon S3 中。記錄必須可立即存取 1 年，然後必須另外存檔 9 年。公司任何人，包括管理使用者和 root 使用者，都無法刪除整個 10 年內的記錄。記錄必須以最大彈性儲存。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？

A.en: Store the records in S3 Glacier for the entire 10-year period. Use an access control policy to deny deletion of the records for a period of 10 years.
A.zh: 將整個 10 年期間的記錄儲存在 S3 Glacier 中。使用存取控制策略在 10 年內拒絕刪除記錄。

B.en: Store the records by using S3 Intelligent-Tiering. Use an IAM policy to deny deletion of the records. After 10 years, change the IAM policy to allow deletion.
B.zh: 使用 S3 智慧分層儲存記錄。使用 IAM 策略拒絕刪除記錄。 10 年後，更改 IAM 策略以允許刪除。

C.en: Use an S3 Lifecycle policy to transition the records from S3 Standard to S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 1 year. Use S3 Object Lock in compliance mode for a period of 10 years.
C.zh: 使用 S3 生命週期策略在 1 年後將記錄從 S3 Standard 過渡到 S3 Glacier Deep Archive。在合規模式下使用 S3 物件鎖定 10 年。

D.en: Use an S3 Lifecycle policy to transition the records from S3 Standard to S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA) after 1 year. Use S3 Object Lock in governance mode for a period of 10 years.
D.zh: 使用 S3 生命週期策略在 1 年後將記錄從 S3 Standard 轉換為 S3 One Zone-Infrequent Access (S3 One Zone-IA)。在治理模式下使用 S3 物件鎖，有效期限為 10 年。

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：在 S3 Glacier 中歸檔記錄立即無法滿足第一年的立即存取要求，且可編輯的存取策略無法阻止管理員或根使用者刪除保護。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Archiving records in S3 Glacier immediately fails the first-year immediate-access requirement, and an editable access policy cannot prevent administrators or the root user from removing protection.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：IAM 拒絕策略可以由足夠特權的身份進行更改，因此無法針對每個管理員和根使用者提供不可變的保留。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: An IAM deny policy can be changed by sufficiently privileged identities and therefore cannot provide immutable retention against every administrator and the root user.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：S3 標準提供第一年的即時訪問，生命週期轉換可降低九年的存檔成本，物件鎖定合規模式可防止十年期間的刪除或保留縮短。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: S3 Standard provides immediate access for the first year, Lifecycle transitions reduce nine-year archive cost, and Object Lock compliance mode prevents deletion or retention shortening during the 10-year period.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：S3 One Zone-IA 不提供最大彈性，具有所需許可權的使用者可以繞過物件鎖定治理模式。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 One Zone-IA does not provide maximum resilience, and Object Lock governance mode can be bypassed by users with the required permission.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 S3 生命週期策略在 1 年後將記錄從 S3 Standard 過渡到 S3 Glacier Deep Archive。在合規模式下使用 S3 物件鎖定 10 年。
answer_text.en: C. Use an S3 Lifecycle policy to transition the records from S3 Standard to S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 1 year. Use S3 Object Lock in compliance mode for a period of 10 years.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：S3 標準提供第一年的即時訪問，生命週期轉換可降低九年的存檔成本，物件鎖定合規模式可防止十年期間的刪除或保留縮短。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: S3 Standard provides immediate access for the first year, Lifecycle transitions reduce nine-year archive cost, and Object Lock compliance mode prevents deletion or retention shortening during the 10-year period.

question_text.en: A company runs multiple Windows workloads on AWS. The company's employees use Windows file shares that are hosted on two Amazon EC2 instances. The file shares synchronize data between themselves and maintain duplicate copies. The company wants a highly available and durable storage solution that preserves how users currently access the files. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上執行多個 Windows 工作負載。該公司的員工使用託管在兩個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上的 Windows 檔案共用。檔案共享在它們之間同步資料並維護重複副本。該公司需要一個高度可用且持久的儲存解決方案，以保留使用者目前存取檔案的方式。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？

A.en: Migrate all the data to Amazon S3. Set up IAM authentication for users to access files.
A.zh: 將所有資料移轉到 Amazon S3。為使用者存取檔案設定 IAM 身份驗證。

B.en: Set up an Amazon S3 File Gateway. Mount the S3 File Gateway on the existing EC2 instances.
B.zh: 設定 Amazon S3 檔案閘道。在現有 EC2 執行個體上安裝 S3 檔案閘道。

C.en: Extend the file share environment to Amazon FSx for Windows File Server with a Multi-AZ configuration. Migrate all the data to FSx for Windows File Server.
C.zh: 使用多可用區設定將檔案共用環境擴充套件到 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server。將所有資料移轉到 FSx for Windows File Server。

D.en: Extend the file share environment to Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) with a Multi-AZ configuration. Migrate all the data to Amazon EFS.
D.zh: 使用多可用區設定將檔案共用環境擴充套件到 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS)。將所有資料移轉到 Amazon EFS。

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon S3 是物件儲存，不保留現有的本機 Windows SMB 檔案共用存取模式。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is object storage and does not preserve the existing native Windows SMB file-share access pattern.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：S3 檔案閘道器旨在用於對 S3 的混合訪問，將其安裝在兩個現有例項上不會將它們替換為高度可用的託管 Windows 檔案系統。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 File Gateway is intended for hybrid access to S3 and mounting it on the two existing instances would not replace them with a highly available managed Windows file system.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：適用於 Windows 檔案伺服器的 Amazon FSx 提供託管 SMB 檔案共享，多可用區部署提供所需的高可用性、永續性和熟悉的 Windows 存取方法。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server provides managed SMB file shares and a Multi-AZ deployment supplies the requested high availability, durability, and familiar Windows access method.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon EFS 為面向 Linux 的工作負載公開 NFS 檔案系統，並非 Windows SMB 檔案共享的本機替代品。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon EFS exposes an NFS file system for Linux-oriented workloads and is not a native replacement for Windows SMB file shares.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用多可用區設定將檔案共用環境擴充套件到 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server。將所有資料移轉到 FSx for Windows File Server。
answer_text.en: C. Extend the file share environment to Amazon FSx for Windows File Server with a Multi-AZ configuration. Migrate all the data to FSx for Windows File Server.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (98%) 2%。考點摘要：適用於 Windows 檔案伺服器的 Amazon FSx 提供託管 SMB 檔案共享，多可用區部署提供所需的高可用性、永續性和熟悉的 Windows 存取方法。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (98%) 2%. Key point: Amazon FSx for Windows File Server provides managed SMB file shares and a Multi-AZ deployment supplies the requested high availability, durability, and familiar Windows access method.

question_text.en: A solutions architect is developing a VPC architecture that includes multiple subnets. The architecture will host applications that use Amazon EC2 instances and Amazon RDS DB instances. The architecture consists of six subnets in two Availability Zones. Each Availability Zone includes a public subnet, a private subnet, and a dedicated subnet for databases. Only EC2 instances that run in the private subnets can have access to the RDS databases. Which solution will meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師正在開發包含多個子網路的 VPC 架構。該架構將託管使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體和 Amazon RDS 資料庫執行個體的應用程式。該架構由兩個可用區中的六個子網路組成。每個可用區包括一個公有子網路、一個私人子網路和一個資料庫專用子網路。只有在私有子網路中執行的 EC2 執行個體才能存取 RDS 資料庫。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？

A.en: Create a new route table that excludes the route to the public subnets' CIDR blocks. Associate the route table with the database subnets.
A.zh: 建立一個新的路由表，其中排除到公有子網路 CIDR 區塊的路由。將路由表與資料庫子網路關聯。

B.en: Create a security group that denies inbound traffic from the security group that is assigned to instances in the public subnets. Attach the security group to the DB instances.
B.zh: 建立一個安全群組，該安全群組拒絕來自指派給公有子網路中的執行個體的安全群組的入站流量。將安全性群組附加到資料庫執行個體。

C.en: Create a security group that allows inbound traffic from the security group that is assigned to instances in the private subnets. Attach the security group to the DB instances.
C.zh: 建立一個安全群組，允許來自分配給私有子網路中的執行個體的安全群組的入站流量。將安全性群組附加到資料庫執行個體。

D.en: Create a new peering connection between the public subnets and the private subnets. Create a different peering connection between the private subnets and the database subnets.
D.zh: 在公有子網路和私有子網路之間建立新的對等連線。在私有子網路和資料庫子網路之間建立不同的對等連線。

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：路由表的目的是控制子網路之間的流量方向，但它不能直接限制特定例項之間的存取。此選項不符合僅允許私有子網路中的 EC2 執行個體存取資料庫的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The purpose of a routing table is to control the direction of traffic between subnets, but it cannot directly restrict access between specific instances. This option does not satisfy the requirement to allow only EC2 instances from private subnets to access the database.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：安全群組是“允許規則”，而不是“拒絕規則”。 AWS 安全群組不支援明確拒絕規則，因此此選項不可行。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The security group is an "allow rule", not a "deny rule". AWS security groups do not support explicit deny rules, so this option is not feasible.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：此選項使用安全群組的「允許規則」來限制訪問，僅允許私有子網路中的EC2例項存取資料庫例項，滿足問題的要求。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option uses the "allow rules" of the security group to restrict access and only allows EC2 instances from the private subnet to access the database instance, which meets the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：VPC並行連線用於連線不同VPC，而不是同一VPC內的子網路。此選項不適用於問題場景。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: VPC parallel connections are used to connect different VPCs, not subnets within the same VPC. This option is not available for question scenarios.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立一個安全群組，允許來自分配給私有子網路中的執行個體的安全群組的入站流量。將安全性群組附加到資料庫執行個體。
answer_text.en: C. Create a security group that allows inbound traffic from the security group that is assigned to instances in the private subnets. Attach the security group to the DB instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：此選項使用安全群組的「允許規則」來限制訪問，僅允許私有子網路中的EC2例項存取資料庫例項，滿足問題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: This option uses the "allow rules" of the security group to restrict access and only allows EC2 instances from the private subnet to access the database instance, which meets the requirements of the question.

question_text.en: A company has registered its domain name with Amazon Route 53. The company uses Amazon API Gateway in the ca-central-1 Region as a public interface for its backend microservice APIs. Third-party services consume the APIs securely. The company wants to design its API Gateway URL with the company's domain name and corresponding certificate so that the third-party services can use HTTPS. Which solution will meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司已在 Amazon Route 53 中註冊了其網域。該公司使用 ca-central-1 區域中的 Amazon API Gateway 作為其後端微服務 API 的公共介面。第三方服務安全地使用 API。該公司希望使用該公司的網域名稱和對應的憑證來設計其API閘道器URL，以便第三方服務可以使用HTTPS。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？

A.en: Create stage variables in API Gateway with Name="Endpoint-URL" and Value="Company Domain Name" to overwrite the default URL. Import the public certificate associated with the company's domain name into AWS Certificate Manager (ACM).
A.zh: 在API閘道器中建立階段變數，名稱=“端點-URL”，值=“公司網域”以覆蓋預設URL。將與公司網域名稱關聯的公共憑證匯入 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM)。

B.en: Create Route 53 DNS records with the company's domain name. Point the alias record to the Regional API Gateway stage endpoint. Import the public certificate associated with the company's domain name into AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the us-east-1 Region.
B.zh: 使用公司網域建立 Route 53 DNS 記錄。將別名記錄指向區域 API 閘道階段端點。將與公司網域名稱關聯的公共憑證匯入 us-east-1 區域中的 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 中。

C.en: Create a Regional API Gateway endpoint. Associate the API Gateway endpoint with the company's domain name. Import the public certificate associated with the company's domain name into AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the same Region. Attach the certificate to the API Gateway endpoint. Configure Route 53 to route traffic to the API Gateway endpoint.
C.zh: 建立區域 API 閘道端點。將API閘道器端點與公司網域名稱關聯。將與公司網域名稱關聯的公共憑證匯入到相同區域的 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 中。將憑證附加到 API 閘道端點。設定 Route 53 以將流量路由到 API 閘道終端節點。

D.en: Create a Regional API Gateway endpoint. Associate the API Gateway endpoint with the company's domain name. Import the public certificate associated with the company's domain name into AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the us-east-1 Region. Attach the certificate to the API Gateway APIs. Create Route 53 DNS records with the company's domain name. Point an A record to the company's domain name.
D.zh: 建立區域 API 閘道端點。將API閘道器端點與公司網域名稱關聯。將與公司網域名稱關聯的公共憑證匯入 us-east-1 區域中的 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 中。將憑證附加到 API 閘道器 API。使用公司的網域建立 Route 53 DNS 記錄。將A記錄指向公司的網域。

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：API Gateway 階段變數不會以自訂網域取代服務 URL，且單獨匯入憑證不會繫結它或設定 DNS。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: API Gateway stage variables do not replace the service URL with a custom domain, and importing a certificate alone does not bind it or configure DNS.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：區域 API 閘道自訂網域需要其 ACM 憑證位於相同區域，而不是 us-east-1，且該憑證必須與自訂網域關聯。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A Regional API Gateway custom domain requires its ACM certificate in the same Region, not us-east-1, and the certificate must be associated with the custom domain.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：區域自訂網域使用 ca-central-1 中的 ACM 證書，將該證書與 API Gateway 關聯，並使用 Route 53 別名將公司網域路由到終端節點。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: A Regional custom domain uses an ACM certificate in ca-central-1, associates that certificate with API Gateway, and uses a Route 53 alias to route the company domain to the endpoint.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：在 us-east-1 中使用 ACM 憑證適用於邊緣最佳化的自訂網域，而不是 ca-central-1 中規定的區域 API 閘道端點。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using an ACM certificate in us-east-1 is appropriate for an edge-optimized custom domain, not the stated Regional API Gateway endpoint in ca-central-1.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立區域 API 閘道端點。將API閘道器端點與公司網域名稱關聯。將與公司網域名稱關聯的公共憑證匯入到相同區域的 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 中。將憑證附加到 API 閘道端點。設定 Route 53 以將流量路由到 API 閘道終端節點。
answer_text.en: C. Create a Regional API Gateway endpoint. Associate the API Gateway endpoint with the company's domain name. Import the public certificate associated with the company's domain name into AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) in the same Region. Attach the certificate to the API Gateway endpoint. Configure Route 53 to route traffic to the API Gateway endpoint.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (95%) 5%。考點摘要：區域自訂網域使用 ca-central-1 中的 ACM 證書，將該證書與 API Gateway 關聯，並使用 Route 53 別名將公司網域路由到終端節點。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (95%) 5%. Key point: A Regional custom domain uses an ACM certificate in ca-central-1, associates that certificate with API Gateway, and uses a Route 53 alias to route the company domain to the endpoint.

question_text.en: A company is running a popular social media website. The website gives users the ability to upload images to share with other users. The company wants to make sure that the images do not contain inappropriate content. The company needs a solution that minimizes development effort. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司正在經營一個流行的社群媒體網站。該網站使使用者能夠上傳影象以與其他使用者分享。該公司希望確保影象不包含不當內容。該公司需要一種能夠最大限度地減少開發工作量的解決方案。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？

A.en: Use Amazon Comprehend to detect inappropriate content. Use human review for low-confidence predictions.
A.zh: 使用 Amazon Comprehend 偵測不當內容。使用人工審核進行低置信度預測。

B.en: Use Amazon Rekognition to detect inappropriate content. Use human review for low-confidence predictions.
B.zh: 使用 Amazon Rekognition 偵測不當內容。使用人工審核進行低置信度預測。

C.en: Use Amazon SageMaker to detect inappropriate content. Use ground truth to label low-confidence predictions.
C.zh: 使用 Amazon SageMaker 偵測不當內容。使用基本事實來標記低置信度預測。

D.en: Use AWS Fargate to deploy a custom machine learning model to detect inappropriate content. Use ground truth to label low-confidence predictions.
D.zh: 使用 AWS Fargate 部署自訂機器學習模型來偵測不當內容。使用基本事實來標記低置信度預測。

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：Amazon Comprehend 分析自然語言文字，但不提供託管影象審核。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon Comprehend analyzes natural-language text and does not provide managed image moderation.

B.zh: 正確。技術原因：Amazon Rekognition 內容審核透過託管 API 偵測不安全或不適當的影像內容，並且可以傳送低置信度結果以進行人工審核，幾乎不需要自訂開發。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon Rekognition Content Moderation detects unsafe or inappropriate image content through a managed API, and low-confidence results can be sent for human review with little custom development.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：建立自訂 SageMaker 模型需要收集標籤、培訓、部署和維護，這超出了所需的最低開發工作量。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Building a custom SageMaker model requires collecting labels, training, deployment, and maintenance, which exceeds the requested minimum development effort.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：在 Fargate 上執行自訂模型仍然需要公司建置、訓練、打包和維護審核模型。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Running a custom model on Fargate still requires the company to build, train, package, and maintain the moderation model.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 Amazon Rekognition 偵測不當內容。使用人工審核進行低置信度預測。
answer_text.en: B. Use Amazon Rekognition to detect inappropriate content. Use human review for low-confidence predictions.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。考點摘要：Amazon Rekognition 內容審核透過託管 API 偵測不安全或不適當的影像內容，並且可以傳送低置信度結果以進行人工審核，幾乎不需要自訂開發。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Key point: Amazon Rekognition Content Moderation detects unsafe or inappropriate image content through a managed API, and low-confidence results can be sent for human review with little custom development.

question_text.en: A company wants to run its critical applications in containers to meet requirements for scalability and availability. The company prefers to focus on maintenance of the critical applications. The company does not want to be responsible for provisioning and managing the underlying infrastructure that runs the containerized workload. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?
question_text.zh: 一家公司希望在容器中執行其關鍵應用程式，以滿足可擴充套件性和可用性的要求。該公司更願意專注於關鍵應用程式的維護。該公司不想負責配置和管理運作容器化工作負載的底層基礎架構。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這些要求？

A.en: Use Amazon EC2 instances, and install Docker on the instances.
A.zh: 使用Amazon EC2例項，並在例項上安裝Docker。

B.en: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on Amazon EC2 worker nodes.
B.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 工作執行緒節點上使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。

C.en: Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate.
C.zh: 在 AWS Fargate 上使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。

D.en: Use Amazon EC2 instances from an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)-optimized Amazon Machine Image (AMI).
D.zh: 使用來自 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 最佳化的 Amazon 系統映像 (AMI) 的 Amazon EC2 執行個體。

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：雖然可以在 EC2 執行個體上安裝 Docker 並執行容器，但這需要使用者負責管理底層 EC2 例項，包括作業更新、執行個體擴充和維護。這與「不想負責管理底層基礎設施」的問題要求不符。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although it is possible to install Docker and run containers on EC2 instances, this requires the user to be responsible for managing the underlying EC2 instance, including operating updates, instance scaling, and maintenance. This is inconsistent with the question requirement of "not wanting to be responsible for managing the underlying infrastructure".

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：使用ECS在EC2工作節點上執行容器仍需要使用者管理EC2例項的生命週期和基礎架構。這與「不想負責管理底層基礎設施」的問題要求不符。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Using ECS ​​to run containers on EC2 worker nodes still requires the user to manage the lifecycle and infrastructure of the EC2 instance. This is inconsistent with the question requirement of "not wanting to be responsible for managing the underlying infrastructure".

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：AWS Fargate 是一種無伺服器運算引擎，使用者無需管理底層 EC2 執行個體或基礎架構。它完全符合這個問題，允許公司專注於維護其關鍵應用程式，而無需管理底層基礎設施。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Fargate is a serverless computing engine that eliminates the need for users to manage underlying EC2 instances or infrastructure. It is fully compliant with the question and allows companies to focus on maintaining their critical applications without having to manage the underlying infrastructure.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：雖然 ECS 最佳化的 AMI 可以促進容器部署，但使用者仍需要管理 EC2 執行個體的生命週期和基礎架構。這與「不想負責管理底層基礎設施」的問題要求不符。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although ECS-optimized AMIs can facilitate container deployment, users are still required to manage the lifecycle and infrastructure of EC2 instances. This is inconsistent with the question requirement of "not wanting to be responsible for managing the underlying infrastructure".

answer_text.zh: C. 在 AWS Fargate 上使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。
answer_text.en: C. Use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) on AWS Fargate.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：AWS Fargate 是一種無伺服器運算引擎，使用者無需管理底層 EC2 執行個體或基礎架構。它完全符合這個問題，允許公司專注於維護其關鍵應用程式，而無需管理底層基礎設施。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: AWS Fargate is a serverless computing engine that eliminates the need for users to manage underlying EC2 instances or infrastructure. It is fully compliant with the question and allows companies to focus on maintaining their critical applications without having to manage the underlying infrastructure.

question_text.en: A company hosts more than 300 global websites and applications. The company requires a platform to analyze more than 30 TB of clickstream data each day. What should a solutions architect do to transmit and process the clickstream data?
question_text.zh: 一家公司在全球擁有 300 多個網站和應用程式。該公司需要一個平臺來分析每天超過 30 TB 的點選流資料。解決方案架構師應該如何傳輸和處理點選流資料？

A.en: Design an AWS Data Pipeline to archive the data to an Amazon S3 bucket and run an Amazon EMR cluster with the data to generate analytics.
A.zh: 設計 AWS Data Pipeline 將資料存檔至 Amazon S3 儲存桶，並使用資料執行 Amazon EMR 叢集以產生分析。

B.en: Create an Auto Scaling group of Amazon EC2 instances to process the data and send it to an Amazon S3 data lake for Amazon Redshift to use for analysis.
B.zh: 建立 Amazon EC2 執行個體的 Auto Scaling 群組來處理資料並將其傳送至 Amazon S3 資料湖以供 Amazon Redshift 用於分析。

C.en: Cache the data to Amazon CloudFront. Store the data in an Amazon S3 bucket. When an object is added to the S3 bucket, run an AWS Lambda function to process the data for analysis.
C.zh: 將資料快取至 Amazon CloudFront。將資料儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。將物件新增至 S3 儲存桶時，請執行 AWS Lambda 函式來處理資料以進行分析。

D.en: Collect the data from Amazon Kinesis Data Streams. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to transmit the data to an Amazon S3 data lake. Load the data in Amazon Redshift for analysis.
D.zh: 從 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 收集資料。使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 將資料傳輸到 Amazon S3 資料湖。將資料載入到 Amazon Redshift 中進行分析。

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：AWS Data Pipeline 和 EMR 批次工作流程不提供 30 TB 每日點選流事件所需的託管即時擷取路徑。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Data Pipeline and an EMR batch workflow do not provide the managed real-time ingestion path needed for 30 TB of daily clickstream events.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：自訂 EC2 佇列要求公司實施攝取、擴充、容錯和維護，而不是使用託管流服務。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A custom EC2 fleet requires the company to implement ingestion, scaling, fault tolerance, and maintenance instead of using managed streaming services.

C.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：CloudFront 將快取內容分發給檢視者，而不是點選串流擷取服務；針對每個 S3 物件呼叫 Lambda 也不適合這種持續的 30 TB 工作負載。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: CloudFront distributes cached content to viewers and is not a clickstream ingestion service; invoking Lambda per S3 object is also unsuitable for this sustained 30 TB workload.

D.zh: 正確。技術原因：Kinesis Data Streams 攝取可擴充套件的即時事件，Firehose 將串流傳輸到 S3 資料湖，Amazon Redshift 提供大規模分析。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Kinesis Data Streams ingests scalable real-time events, Firehose delivers the stream into an S3 data lake, and Amazon Redshift provides large-scale analytics.

answer_text.zh: D. 從 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 收集資料。使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 將資料傳輸到 Amazon S3 資料湖。將資料載入到 Amazon Redshift 中進行分析。
answer_text.en: D. Collect the data from Amazon Kinesis Data Streams. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to transmit the data to an Amazon S3 data lake. Load the data in Amazon Redshift for analysis.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (92%) 8%。考點摘要：Kinesis Data Streams 攝取可擴充套件的即時事件，Firehose 將串流傳輸到 S3 資料湖，Amazon Redshift 提供大規模分析。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (92%) 8%. Key point: Kinesis Data Streams ingests scalable real-time events, Firehose delivers the stream into an S3 data lake, and Amazon Redshift provides large-scale analytics.

question_text.en: A company has a website hosted on AWS. The website is behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB) that is configured to handle HTTP and HTTPS separately. The company wants to forward all requests to the website so that the requests will use HTTPS. What should a solutions architect do to meet this requirement?
question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個託管在 AWS 上的網站。該網站位於應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面，該負載平衡器配置為單獨處理 HTTP 和 HTTPS。該公司希望將所有請求轉送到網站，以便請求將使用 HTTPS。解決方案架構師應該怎麼做才能滿足這項要求？

A.en: Update the ALB's network ACL to accept only HTTPS traffic.
A.zh: 更新 ALB 的網路 ACL 以僅接受 HTTPS 流量。

B.en: Create a rule that replaces the HTTP in the URL with HTTPS.
B.zh: 建立一條規則，將 URL 中的 HTTP 替換為 HTTPS。

C.en: Create a listener rule on the ALB to redirect HTTP traffic to HTTPS.
C.zh: 在ALB上建立監聽規則，將HTTP流量重新導向到HTTPS。

D.en: Replace the ALB with a Network Load Balancer configured to use Server Name Indication (SNI).
D.zh: 將 ALB 替換為配置為使用伺服器名稱指示 (SNI) 的網路負載平衡器。

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

A.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：網路 ACL 可以允許或拒絕子網路流量，但無法發出 HTTP 重新導向，因此使用 HTTP 的使用者端將被阻止，而不是轉送至 HTTPS。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A network ACL can allow or deny subnet traffic but cannot issue an HTTP redirect, so clients using HTTP would be blocked instead of forwarded to HTTPS.

B.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：通用 URL 取代規則不是 ALB 操作，並且不會實現傳入 HTTP 請求所需的偵聽器等級重新導向。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A generic URL replacement rule is not an ALB action and does not implement the listener-level redirect required for incoming HTTP requests.

C.zh: 正確。技術原因：具有重定向操作的 HTTP 偵聽器規則可以將 HTTPS 協定和連線埠傳回每個使用者端，以便所有後續網站請求都使用 TLS。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: An HTTP listener rule with a redirect action can return the HTTPS protocol and port to each client so all subsequent website requests use TLS.

D.zh: 錯誤。技術原因：網路負載平衡器執行在傳輸層，SNI選擇TLS憑證；這兩個功能均不提供 ALB HTTP 到 HTTPS 重定向。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: A Network Load Balancer operates at the transport layer and SNI selects TLS certificates; neither feature provides ALB HTTP-to-HTTPS redirection.

answer_text.zh: C. 在ALB上建立監聽規則，將HTTP流量重新導向到HTTPS。
answer_text.en: C. Create a listener rule on the ALB to redirect HTTP traffic to HTTPS.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。考點摘要：具有重定向操作的 HTTP 偵聽器規則可以將 HTTPS 協定和連線埠傳回每個使用者端，以便所有後續網站請求都使用 TLS。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Key point: An HTTP listener rule with a redirect action can return the HTTPS protocol and port to each client so all subsequent website requests use TLS.
